title: The Future of JavaScript Frameworks
description: A deep dive into the trends and future of popular JavaScript frameworks like React, Vue, and Angular.

title: Building Scalable APIs with Node.js
description: Learn how to design and build RESTful APIs that can handle high traffic and scale effectively.

title: Mastering CSS Grid and Flexbox
description: A hands-on workshop to master the modern CSS layout techniques of Grid and Flexbox.

title: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python
description: An introductory session on the fundamentals of machine learning using Python and popular libraries like Scikit-learn.

title: DevOps for Dummies
description: A beginner-friendly guide to DevOps principles, continuous integration, and continuous deployment.

title: The Art of Debugging
description: Learn effective strategies and tools for debugging code across different programming languages and environments.
